title: Allocation of project number to each board
excerpt: Hello, would like to know if there is a feature where a number is populated and assigned as a board is created. We have 20+ projects on the go, each has a separate board and number. Thanks :slight_smile:

posts.author: CJ25 (Carly)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, would like to know if there is a feature where a number is populated and assigned as a board is created. We have 20+ projects on the go, each has a separate board and number. Thanks
